proposedSkills.name: Gstack
proposedSkills.description: Fast headless browser for QA testing and site dogfooding. Navigate pages, interact with elements, verify state, diff before/after, take annotated screenshots, test responsive layouts, forms, uploads, dialogs, and capture bug evidence. Use when asked to open or test a site, verify a deployment, dogfood a user flow, or file a bug with screenshots.

proposedSkills.rationale: Curated from garrytan/gstack SKILL.md; repository ships this as a first-class agent skill.

proposedSkills.name: Autoplan
proposedSkills.description: Auto-review pipeline — reads the full CEO, design, eng, and DX review skills from disk and runs them sequentially with auto-decisions using 6 decision principles. Surfaces taste decisions (close approaches, borderline scope, codex disagreements) at a final approval gate. One command, fully reviewed plan out. Use when asked to "auto review", "autoplan", "run all reviews", "review this plan automatically", or "make the decisions for me". Proactively suggest when the user has a plan file and wants to run the full review gauntlet without answering 15-30 intermediate questions. (gstack) Voice triggers (speech-to-text aliases): "auto plan",...

evidence.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter and workflow documentation for /autoplan.

proposedSkills.rationale: Curated from garrytan/gstack autoplan/SKILL.md; repository ships this as a first-class agent skill.

proposedSkills.name: Benchmark
proposedSkills.description: Performance regression detection using the browse daemon. Establishes baselines for page load times, Core Web Vitals, and resource sizes. Compares before/after on every PR. Tracks performance trends over time. Use when: "performance", "benchmark", "page speed", "lighthouse", "web vitals", "bundle size", "load time". (gstack) Voice triggers (speech-to-text aliases): "speed test", "check performance".

evidence.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter and workflow documentation for /benchmark.

proposedSkills.name: Benchmark Models
proposedSkills.description: Cross-model benchmark for gstack skills. Runs the same prompt through Claude, GPT (via Codex CLI), and Gemini side-by-side — compares latency, tokens, cost, and optionally quality via LLM judge. Answers "which model is actually best for this skill?" with data instead of vibes. Separate from /benchmark, which measures web page performance. Use when: "benchmark models", "compare models", "which model is best for X", "cross-model comparison", "model shootout". (gstack) Voice triggers (speech-to-text aliases): "compare models", "model shootout", "which model is best".

proposedSkills.name: Context Restore

proposedSkills.name: Setup Deploy
proposedSkills.description: Configure deployment settings for /land-and-deploy. Detects your deploy platform (Fly.io, Render, Vercel, Netlify, Heroku, GitHub Actions, custom), production URL, health check endpoints, and deploy status commands. Writes the configuration to CLAUDE.md so all future deploys are automatic. Use when: "setup deploy", "configure deployment", "set up land-and-deploy", "how do I deploy with gstack", "add deploy config".

evidence.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter and workflow documentation for /setup-deploy.

proposedSkills.rationale: Curated from garrytan/gstack setup-deploy/SKILL.md; repository ships this as a first-class agent skill.

proposedSkills.name: Setup Gbrain
proposedSkills.description: Set up gbrain for this coding agent: install the CLI, initialize a local PGLite or Supabase brain, register MCP, capture per-remote trust policy. One command from zero to "gbrain is running, and this agent can call it." Use when: "setup gbrain", "connect gbrain", "start gbrain", "install gbrain", "configure gbrain for this machine".

evidence.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter and workflow documentation for /setup-gbrain.

proposedSkills.rationale: Curated from garrytan/gstack setup-gbrain/SKILL.md; repository ships this as a first-class agent skill.

proposedSkills.name: Ship
proposedSkills.description: Ship workflow: detect + merge base branch, run tests, review diff, bump VERSION, update CHANGELOG, commit, push, create PR. Use when asked to "ship", "deploy", "push to main", "create a PR", "merge and push", or "get it deployed". Proactively invoke this skill (do NOT push/PR directly) when the user says code is ready, asks about deploying, wants to push code up, or asks to create a PR.

evidence.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter and workflow documentation for /ship.

proposedSkills.rationale: Curated from garrytan/gstack ship/SKILL.md; repository ships this as a first-class agent skill.

proposedSkills.name: Skillify
proposedSkills.description: Codify the most recent successful /scrape flow into a permanent browser-skill on disk. Future /scrape calls with the same intent run the codified script in ~200ms instead of re-driving the page. Walks back through the conversation, synthesizes script.ts + script.test.ts + fixture, runs the test in a temp dir, and asks before committing. Use when asked to "skillify", "codify", "save this scrape", or "make this permanent".

evidence.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter and workflow documentation for /skillify.

proposedSkills.rationale: Curated from garrytan/gstack skillify/SKILL.md; repository ships this as a first-class agent skill.

proposedSkills.name: Sync Gbrain
proposedSkills.description: Keep gbrain current with this repo's code and refresh agent search guidance in CLAUDE.md. Wraps the gstack-gbrain-sync orchestrator with state probing, native code-surface registration, capability checks, and a verdict block. Re-runnable, idempotent. Use when: "sync gbrain", "refresh gbrain", "re-index this repo", "gbrain search isn't finding things".

evidence.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter and workflow documentation for /sync-gbrain.

proposedSkills.rationale: Curated from garrytan/gstack sync-gbrain/SKILL.md; repository ships this as a first-class agent skill.

proposedSkills.name: Unfreeze
proposedSkills.description: Clear the freeze boundary set by /freeze, allowing edits to all directories again. Use when you want to widen edit scope without ending the session. Use when asked to "unfreeze", "unlock edits", "remove freeze", or "allow all edits".

evidence.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter and workflow documentation for /unfreeze.

proposedSkills.rationale: Curated from garrytan/gstack unfreeze/SKILL.md; repository ships this as a first-class agent skill.
